dataset.query: FROM logs-aws.cloudtrail* | WHERE event.dataset == "aws.cloudtrail" AND (event.action IN ("ListUsers", "CreateAccessKey", "AttachUserPolicy", "AssumeRole") OR threat.tactic.name IS NOT NULL) | STATS c = COUNT()

FROM logs-aws.cloudtrail* | WHERE event.dataset == "aws.cloudtrail" AND (event.action IN ("ListUsers", "CreateAccessKey", "AttachUserPolicy", "AssumeRole") OR threat.tactic.name IS NOT NULL) | STATS c = COUNT_DISTINCT(source.ip)
FROM logs-aws.cloudtrail* | WHERE event.action == "AssumeRole" AND event.outcome == "success" | STATS c = COUNT()

FROM logs-aws.cloudtrail* | WHERE event.dataset == "aws.cloudtrail" AND (event.action IN ("ListUsers", "CreateAccessKey", "AttachUserPolicy", "AssumeRole") OR threat.tactic.name IS NOT NULL) AND threat.tactic.name IS NOT NULL | STATS c = COUNT() BY tactic = threat.tactic.name

FROM logs-aws.cloudtrail* | WHERE event.dataset == "aws.cloudtrail" AND (event.action IN ("ListUsers", "CreateAccessKey", "AttachUserPolicy", "AssumeRole") OR threat.tactic.name IS NOT NULL) | STATS c = COUNT() BY b = BUCKET(`@timestamp`, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT b

FROM logs-aws.cloudtrail* | WHERE event.dataset == "aws.cloudtrail" AND (event.action IN ("ListUsers", "CreateAccessKey", "AttachUserPolicy", "AssumeRole") OR threat.tactic.name IS NOT NULL) | STATS steps = COUNT(), methods = COUNT_DISTINCT(event.action), uid_type = MAX(aws.cloudtrail.user_identity.type) BY attacker = user.name, src = source.ip | SORT steps DESC | LIMIT 25
